evaluator_feedback: Baseline attempt produced the required artifacts and applied a clear deterministic normalization and scoring formula; per-row traceability, sensitivity testing, remediation cost arithmetic, and expert-review flags are present. Minor completeness issues reduce semantic polish: (1) no explicit numeric rounding/precision policy or demonstration that rounding will not flip classifications; (2) unresolved ambiguity mapping four supplied raw fields to three scoring drivers (correctly flagged as needs_review but requires a short decision-tree or authoritative citation); (3) the superintendent brief preview is truncated (R4 row cut) so ensure the delivered brief is complete; (4) clarify interpretation and cap for O3 margin improvement and provide a separate machine-readable sensitivity summary CSV for automated verifiers.
